seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Specify a preferred time frame for the demo.
new_constraint: Avoid specifying a time frame for the demo.
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Specify a preferred time frame for the demo. Avoid specifying a time frame for the demo.
response:
Subject: Request for Product Demo - [Product Name/Your Company Name]

Dear [Developer Name],

I have been following the development of [Product Name] and am very impressed with the features and functionality you have built so far.

I would like to schedule a product demo to get a deeper look at the platform and understand how it might fit into our current workflow. Could you please let me know your availability for a brief walkthrough?

I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Phone Number]<turn|>
